summary: Excellent front‑of‑house capture with crystal‑clear soundboard mix, though Brent's keyboard mic is missing, delivering a stellar performance.
review: The reviewer rates both the setlist and the audio five stars, calling this FO B recording as good as it gets. The sound quality is described as flawless, aside from the unusual lack of a microphone for Brent which eliminates his background vocals. Overall the show is praised as a must‑hear experience.

ai_rating.rationale: Single detailed five‑star review highlights an outstanding performance and excellent recording quality, with only one minor technical omission (missing Brent mic).

recording_quality.technical_notes: Crisp front‑of‑house mix; no microphone set up for Brent on this night, resulting in missing background vocals.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewer gives the entire setlist five stars and says it will not disappoint first‑time listeners.

band_member_comments.Keys: No microphone was set up for Brent, so his keyboard parts lack vocal presence.
